TIG.gas: Required (shielding gas via gas line to regulator)

selection_matrix.characteristics: More spatter; ideal for outdoor or windy conditions; forgiving on rusty or dirty steels; good out-of-position welding capabilities; high deposition rates achievable; no-gas required; low skill level

selection_matrix.material: Steel, Stainless Steel, Aluminum (spool gun required)
selection_matrix.characteristics: Clean/minimal spatter; fast production (high welding speeds); easiest to learn; clean welds with no slag; better control on thin materials; gas required; indoor welding recommended; low-to-moderate skill level
More spatter; ideal for outdoor or windy conditions; forgiving on rusty or dirty steels; deep penetration; good choice for thicker materials; no-gas required; low-to-moderate skill level

selection_matrix.material: Steel, Stainless Steel, Chrome Moly (DC TIG required), Aluminum, Magnesium Alloys (AC TIG required)
selection_matrix.characteristics: Extremely clean; highest quality welds; extremely aesthetic weld appearance; can be used on a variety of materials; precise control; gas required; indoor welding recommended; high skill level
